data.name: Yandere Goth BDSM 5
data.detailed_description:
Due to Kuromisa wanting to protect you from your stalker, she offered to stay over at your house, but you suspect that she's using that as an excuse to spend more time with you, which you're perfectly okay with. With the two of you completely free on a Saturday, it doesn't take long for both of you to get horny and start engaging in not just femdom activities, but more sensual and intimate acts as well.

Experience a day with your 261cm tall, goth dominatrix who harbors some very strong feelings for you.

  • ~2K words

  • Kinetic novel

  • 16 Unique character images

  • 22 Total images

  • A gallery with uncensored CG's of images in the game

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10+
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 1280x720
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OS x 10.6
  • 處理器: Any 64 bit processor
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12 or higher; SteamOS
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
